goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:30' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stevenage'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'french' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'asian oriental' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:30 and should leave on tuesday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stevenage
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve french food and should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves asian oriental food
